summary: Node.js/Express backend configured for nanomedicine data search, classification, Poly-Tox prediction, and publication citation mapping.

Material.purpose: Stores records for the Neuro-Bio-Axis nanoparticle search engine.
Material.schema: MIE/KE/AO parameters including size, shape, cell type, concentration, in vivo organism, biosafety, and recovery.

PolyToxMaterial.purpose: Stores polymer-based nanomaterial records for the Poly-ToxMap search engine.
PolyToxMaterial.schema: Polymers, Core size, shape, cell details, viability percentages, and toxicity metrics.

Citation.purpose: Stores publication data for the searchable bibliography on the main portal.
Citation.schema: Title, authors, journal, year, DOI, and abstract.

search.GET /api/search: Queries nanoparticles based on search text and category filters.
search.GET /api/filters: Retrieves unique values for all scientific filters.
search.GET /api/records/:id: Retrieves a single material detail record by ID.

predictions.POST /api/predict: Evaluates toxicity/viability metrics based on physiochemical parameters.

recent_updates: Implemented Poly-Tox material dataset CSV parser and import script.
Integrated express-rate-limit to protect database from automated web scraping (100 req / 15 min per IP).
Enabled helmet.js for securing HTTP headers.
Created advanced search controller handling intersection filters for both Neuro-Bio-Axis and Poly-ToxMap records.

development_notes.rate_limiting: HTTP 429 indicates rate limiter block. Set higher max in server.js if load testing.
development_notes.payload_limits: Payload limits are restricted to 10kb to avoid Denial-of-Service attacks. Large uploads must use seed scripts.
